aids.title: P and V Operations
aids.content:
P = Proberen (Dutch: to test) = wait = down = acquire
V = Verhogen (Dutch: to increment) = signal = up = release

P: "Please wait"
V: "Very good, proceed!"

aids.title: Semaphore Patterns
aids.content:
1. Mutex: sem=1, wait-CS-signal
2. Ordering: sem=0, signal after S1, wait before S2
3. Resource: sem=N, wait to acquire, signal to release

aids.title: Negative Value Meaning
aids.content:
If semaphore value is negative:
|value| = number of waiting processes

value = 1: One available
value = 0: None available, none waiting
value = -3: Three processes waiting
